data.description:
Least-privilege tool access and per-step model choice.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Scoped ticket tool by narrowing the existing surface (reuse READONLY/ALLOW_LLM gates); read + comment only (no write/transition/sign).
- [ ] Per-step model/provider via init_chat_model; precedence step > workflow > config > env > default, documented.
Files: src/rebar/llm/runner.py, src/rebar/llm/config.py
data.title: WS-D3: Scoped rebar ticket tool + multi-provider per step
